title: The Inexplicable Giant Floating Baby Head

content.problemStatement:
A Dr.D’s Legacy Original\textit{A Dr.D's Legacy Original}A Dr.D’s Legacy Original

Dr.D wishes to choose exactly KKK distinct integers from a given interval [L,R][L, R][L,R] in such a way that the bitwise AND of the chosen integers is maximum possible. Find this maximum value.
content.inputFormat: First line contains an integer T. Each test case contains three space-separated integers L, R, and K.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer — the maximum value of the bitwise AND.

solution.approach: For each test case, we can use a brute force approach to find the maximum bitwise AND of K distinct integers in the range [L, R]. We can iterate over all possible K-subsets of the range [L, R] and calculate the bitwise AND of each subset. The maximum bitwise AND found will be the answer.
solution.timeComplexity: O(R * (R choose K)) with R being the range [L, R] and K being the number of distinct integers to choose.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(R) for storing the range [L, R] and the K-subsets.
